title: KoHs Offhand Whitelist
description: Client-side offhand whitelist with searchable items and custom presets.
body:
# KoHs Offhand Whitelist

**KoHs Offhand Whitelist** is a client-side Fabric mod that controls which items you can move into the offhand slot.

Instead of allowing every item, the mod uses a whitelist.  
If an item is not allowed, the mod blocks offhand insertion/swap actions for that item.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/544d133d21012e7b7fd0d457336801273ddfe06a_0.webp)

## What this mod does
- Blocks non-whitelisted items from being placed in offhand
- Allows editing the whitelist from an in-game GUI
- Shows all Minecraft items (including potion variants) with search
- Lets you quickly add/remove items with `+` and `-`
- Supports presets (built-in + custom)
- Auto-saves changes instantly (no manual save needed)

## GUI Tabs
- **Whitelist**: manage allowed and non-allowed items
- **Create Preset**: build/edit a preset from selected items
- **Custom Presets**: use, edit, or delete saved presets
- **Report Issues**: support/help section with Discord button

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a143fbb2848fa7c2f872200eac9e28f6dcdfcd5a.png)

## Why use it
Useful for PvP and utility clients when you want strict offhand control (for example only totem, shield, crystals, specific potions, etc.).

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43d947d708f08147f086507e519d2a26f47e6bb6.gif)




## Support
For support or help creating mods/plugins:  
**https://discord.gg/TpBbyxhFSF**
